TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mhtuw squw ryax tay qutux na byacing tay mtzyu' na kawas Amerika' tay 1936 kwawas, wal mhuqil sa 74 kawas. hayyo na ega' ruw pgeki' na Nasafu sraral na squliq na Alpaniya'. trang ssulu' ptciriq ga, nanu' hiya' quw cinqsu' balay musa' mghayyo kya squw Hawlai'u nquw kahul Tng'o na squiq. kawas tay 1941 lga musa' tmwang kya squw koswowo kwara' qutux ngasal na Fehmiu qaniy, maki' kkya quw qnxan niya' sa kin'laqi' niya'. trang kocyuw pinqwasan niya' ga musa' mluw sa qutux gluw na pgeki', ruw malax piqwasn niya' lga yasa siy luhing mg hayyo' kya la. pin'ega' nya' squw kawas 1960 hya'ga yasa quw sisay mha pzyang balay wal hmenas squw ryax niya' pgeki' qasa, cingay balay wal niya' galun qnabu', ruw wal tehuk squw Oska' quw lalu' niya'. ruw wal memaw sngusun mita' na pkbalay ega' ruw wal miru' keyak uziy. kawas tay 1968 lga, biqan naha' sa pzyang balay p'ega' aquw pzyang balay baq balay p'iga' na Awtsay qasa. memaw balay krahu' balay lalu' niya' squw p'ega' kya Osyuw qasa, ruw thuyay wal mg'rayxyo nquw ega' kya osyuw qasa. ana maha musa' mtzyuwaw kya Hawlay'uw ga wal ini' thzyay psyax balay sa lalu' niya' hya', ruw babaw niya' lga musa' mbzinah lzwziy squw Osyuw lawziy la. pucing balay na pinhayyo niya' ga, pzyux balay ini' ptnaq kay' nwahan niya' pgeki' ega' , ana kinna ke Fulans', ke' na Speng, ru ke' na Itari'. kinblayqan lalu' na pintzyuwaw niya' hmenas mang squliq smawya' hiya' squliq na Nasrafu sawn miru' na zasi' na TIMES quw Fehmin. wal memaw strahu' miru' na zasi' kknayril na Etari' maha cyux 'mimaw squw mawpuw hi' ka thuyay balay zmuwi' inlungan na squliq tay mpusal na Seki' qasa. aring squw kawas tay 1953 ruw pucing kawas 1998 lga 41kwara' wal niya' kblazyun ega', ruw hiya' uziy quw qsu' balay musa' p'ega kya qalang na Naslafu na squliq na Alpaniya'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: mħtuw s~ɕquw rjax taj qutux na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj mtzjuʔ na kawas~ɕ amerikaʔ taj **** kwawas~ɕ, wal mħuqil s~ɕa ** kawas~ɕ. ħajjo na eɣaʔ ruw pɣekiʔ na nas~ɕa*u s~ɕraral na s~ɕquliq na alpanijaʔ. traŋ s~ɕs~ɕuluʔ ptʦ~ʨiriq ɣa, nanuʔ ħijaʔ quw ʦ~ʨinqs~ɕuʔ βalaj mus~ɕaʔ mɣħajjo kja s~ɕquw ħawlaiʔu nquw kaħul tŋʔo na s~ɕquiq. kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa mus~ɕaʔ tmwaŋ kja s~ɕquw kos~ɕwowo kwaraʔ qutux ŋas~ɕal na *eħmiu qanij, makiʔ kkja quw qnxan nijaʔ s~ɕa kinʔlaqiʔ nijaʔ. traŋ koʦ~ʨjuw pinqwas~ɕan nijaʔ ɣa mus~ɕaʔ mluw s~ɕa qutux ɣluw na pɣekiʔ, ruw malax piqwas~ɕn nijaʔ lɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕij luħiŋ mɣ ħajjoʔ kja la. pinʔeɣaʔ njaʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ **** ħjaʔɣa jas~ɕa quw s~ɕis~ɕaj mħa pzjaŋ βalaj wal ħmenas~ɕ s~ɕquw rjax nijaʔ pɣekiʔ qas~ɕa, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj wal nijaʔ ɣalun qnaβuʔ, ruw wal teħuk s~ɕquw os~ɕkaʔ quw laluʔ nijaʔ. ruw wal memaw s~ɕŋus~ɕun mitaʔ na pkβalaj eɣaʔ ruw wal miruʔ kejak uzij. kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa, βiqan naħaʔ s~ɕa pzjaŋ βalaj pʔeɣaʔ aquw pzjaŋ βalaj βaq βalaj pʔiɣaʔ na awts~ɕaj qas~ɕa. memaw βalaj kraħuʔ βalaj laluʔ nijaʔ s~ɕquw pʔeɣaʔ kja os~ɕjuw qas~ɕa, ruw tħujaj wal mɣʔrajxjo nquw eɣaʔ kja os~ɕjuw qas~ɕa. ana maħa mus~ɕaʔ mtzjuwaw kja ħawlajʔuw ɣa wal iniʔ tħzjaj ps~ɕjax βalaj s~ɕa laluʔ nijaʔ ħjaʔ, ruw βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa mus~ɕaʔ mβzinaħ lzwzij s~ɕquw os~ɕjuw lawzij la. puʦ~ʨiŋ βalaj na pinħajjo nijaʔ ɣa, pzjux βalaj iniʔ ptnaq kajʔ nwaħan nijaʔ pɣekiʔ eɣaʔ , ana kinna ke *ulans~ɕʔ, keʔ na s~ɕpeŋ, ru keʔ na itariʔ. kinβlajqan laluʔ na pintzjuwaw nijaʔ ħmenas~ɕ maŋ s~ɕquliq s~ɕmawjaʔ ħijaʔ s~ɕquliq na nas~ɕra*u s~ɕawn miruʔ na zas~ɕiʔ na times~ɕ quw *eħmin. wal memaw s~ɕtraħuʔ miruʔ na zas~ɕiʔ kknajril na etariʔ maħa ʦ~ʨjux ʔmimaw s~ɕquw mawpuw ħiʔ ka tħujaj βalaj zmuwiʔ inluŋan na s~ɕquliq taj mpus~ɕal na s~ɕekiʔ qas~ɕa. ariŋ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ taj **** ruw puʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ **** lɣa **kwaraʔ wal nijaʔ kβlazjun eɣaʔ, ruw ħijaʔ uzij quw qs~ɕuʔ βalaj mus~ɕaʔ pʔeɣa kja qalaŋ na nas~ɕla*u na s~ɕquliq na alpanijaʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: mhtuw squw ryax tay qutux na byacing tay mtzyu' na kawas Amerika' tay 1936 kwawas, wal mhuqil sa 74 kawas. hayyo na ega' ruw pgeki' na Nasafu sraral na squliq na Alpaniya'. trang ssulu' ptciriq ga, nanu' hiya' quw cinqsu' balay musa' mghayyo kya squw Hawlai'u nquw kahul Tng'o na squiq. kawas tay 1941 lga musa' tmwang kya squw koswowo kwara' qutux ngasal na Fehmiu qaniy, maki' kkya quw qnxan niya' sa kin'laqi' niya'. trang kocyuw pinqwasan niya' ga musa' mluw sa qutux gluw na pgeki', ruw malax piqwasn niya' lga yasa siy luhing mg hayyo' kya la. pin'ega' nya' squw kawas 1960 hya'ga yasa quw sisay mha pzyang balay wal hmenas squw ryax niya' pgeki' qasa, cingay balay wal niya' galun qnabu', ruw wal tehuk squw Oska' quw lalu' niya'. ruw wal memaw sngusun mita' na pkbalay ega' ruw wal miru' keyak uziy. kawas tay 1968 lga, biqan naha' sa pzyang balay p'ega' aquw pzyang balay baq balay p'iga' na Awtsay qasa. memaw balay krahu' balay lalu' niya' squw p'ega' kya Osyuw qasa, ruw thuyay wal mg'rayxyo nquw ega' kya osyuw qasa. ana maha musa' mtzyuwaw kya Hawlay'uw ga wal ini' thzyay psyax balay sa lalu' niya' hya', ruw babaw niya' lga musa' mbzinah lzwziy squw Osyuw lawziy la. pucing balay na pinhayyo niya' ga, pzyux balay ini' ptnaq kay' nwahan niya' pgeki' ega' , ana kinna ke Fulans', ke' na Speng, ru ke' na Itari'. kinblayqan lalu' na pintzyuwaw niya' hmenas mang squliq smawya' hiya' squliq na Nasrafu sawn miru' na zasi' na TIMES quw Fehmin. wal memaw strahu' miru' na zasi' kknayril na Etari' maha cyux 'mimaw squw mawpuw hi' ka thuyay balay zmuwi' inlungan na squliq tay mpusal na Seki' qasa. aring squw kawas tay 1953 ruw pucing kawas 1998 lga 41kwara' wal niya' kblazyun ega', ruw hiya' uziy quw qsu' balay musa' p'ega kya qalang na Naslafu na squliq na Alpaniya'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: mħtuw s~ɕquw rjax taj qutux na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj mtzjuʔ na kawas~ɕ amerikaʔ taj **** kwawas~ɕ, wal mħuqil s~ɕa ** kawas~ɕ. ħajjo na eɣaʔ ruw pɣekiʔ na nas~ɕa*u s~ɕraral na s~ɕquliq na alpanijaʔ. traŋ s~ɕs~ɕuluʔ ptʦ~ʨiriq ɣa, nanuʔ ħijaʔ quw ʦ~ʨinqs~ɕuʔ βalaj mus~ɕaʔ mɣħajjo kja s~ɕquw ħawlaiʔu nquw kaħul tŋʔo na s~ɕquiq. kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa mus~ɕaʔ tmwaŋ kja s~ɕquw kos~ɕwowo kwaraʔ qutux ŋas~ɕal na *eħmiu qanij, makiʔ kkja quw qnxan nijaʔ s~ɕa kinʔlaqiʔ nijaʔ. traŋ koʦ~ʨjuw pinqwas~ɕan nijaʔ ɣa mus~ɕaʔ mluw s~ɕa qutux ɣluw na pɣekiʔ, ruw malax piqwas~ɕn nijaʔ lɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕij luħiŋ mɣ ħajjoʔ kja la. pinʔeɣaʔ njaʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ **** ħjaʔɣa jas~ɕa quw s~ɕis~ɕaj mħa pzjaŋ βalaj wal ħmenas~ɕ s~ɕquw rjax nijaʔ pɣekiʔ qas~ɕa, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj wal nijaʔ ɣalun qnaβuʔ, ruw wal teħuk s~ɕquw os~ɕkaʔ quw laluʔ nijaʔ. ruw wal memaw s~ɕŋus~ɕun mitaʔ na pkβalaj eɣaʔ ruw wal miruʔ kejak uzij. kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa, βiqan naħaʔ s~ɕa pzjaŋ βalaj pʔeɣaʔ aquw pzjaŋ βalaj βaq βalaj pʔiɣaʔ na awts~ɕaj qas~ɕa. memaw βalaj kraħuʔ βalaj laluʔ nijaʔ s~ɕquw pʔeɣaʔ kja os~ɕjuw qas~ɕa, ruw tħujaj wal mɣʔrajxjo nquw eɣaʔ kja os~ɕjuw qas~ɕa. ana maħa mus~ɕaʔ mtzjuwaw kja ħawlajʔuw ɣa wal iniʔ tħzjaj ps~ɕjax βalaj s~ɕa laluʔ nijaʔ ħjaʔ, ruw βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa mus~ɕaʔ mβzinaħ lzwzij s~ɕquw os~ɕjuw lawzij la. puʦ~ʨiŋ βalaj na pinħajjo nijaʔ ɣa, pzjux βalaj iniʔ ptnaq kajʔ nwaħan nijaʔ pɣekiʔ eɣaʔ , ana kinna ke *ulans~ɕʔ, keʔ na s~ɕpeŋ, ru keʔ na itariʔ. kinβlajqan laluʔ na pintzjuwaw nijaʔ ħmenas~ɕ maŋ s~ɕquliq s~ɕmawjaʔ ħijaʔ s~ɕquliq na nas~ɕra*u s~ɕawn miruʔ na zas~ɕiʔ na times~ɕ quw *eħmin. wal memaw s~ɕtraħuʔ miruʔ na zas~ɕiʔ kknajril na etariʔ maħa ʦ~ʨjux ʔmimaw s~ɕquw mawpuw ħiʔ ka tħujaj βalaj zmuwiʔ inluŋan na s~ɕquliq taj mpus~ɕal na s~ɕekiʔ qas~ɕa. ariŋ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ taj **** ruw puʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ **** lɣa **kwaraʔ wal nijaʔ kβlazjun eɣaʔ, ruw ħijaʔ uzij quw qs~ɕuʔ βalaj mus~ɕaʔ pʔeɣa kja qalaŋ na nas~ɕla*u na s~ɕquliq na alpanijaʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
